results.rendered_html:
pācya (von 1. pac) adj.
1〉 was gekocht werden muss: avaśya˚  P. 7,3,65 , Sch. avaśyaṃ pācyam  VOP. 26,9 .
— 2〉 was zur Reife gebracht werden kann: yacca svabhāvaṃ pacati viśvayoniḥ pācyāṃśca sarvānpariṇāmayedyaḥ  ŚVETĀŚV. UP. 5,5 .
— Vgl. pākya.
